headline: Is Entergy’s Grid Resilience Push and Community Focus Quietly Reframing Its Risk Profile (ETR)?
summary: Entergy recently highlighted its community engagement in Southeast Louisiana, where a United Way campaign led by Chair and CEO Drew Marsh raised over US$7.70 million and recognized Vice President Michelle Delery with a Volunteer of the Year award. At the same time, Entergy’s growing emphasis on grid upgrades and resilience spending is drawing investor attention to how it balances infrastructure modernization with funding discipline and regulatory oversight. We’ll now explore how Entergy’s...

headline: Entergy (ETR) Stock May Be Above Fair Value Despite Equity Raise
summary: Entergy stock has delivered a strong 168.9% total return over the past five years. Its current checks point to a richer valuation, with the Dividend Discount Model (DDM) suggesting the shares trade at a premium to intrinsic value, while market based multiples look roughly in line. Over five years, Entergy has returned 168.9%. This puts extra focus on whether the current price already reflects much of that progress. Recent equity issuance through the ATM and underwritten forward sale...
